init_eqs_str: a['xtc'] = 0; a['speed'] = 0; a['acid'] = 0; a['morphine'] = 0; a['dmt'] = 0; a['saliva'] = 0; a['mv_x']=64; a['mv_y']=48; a['nut']=0; a['stp']=0; a['stq']=0; a['rtp']=0; a['rtq']=0; a['wvr']=0; a['decay']=0; a['dcsp']=0;
frame_eqs_str: a['decay']=0.98; a['zoom']=0.97; a['wave_mystery']=Math.sin(a['time']); a['rot']=0; a['warp']=Math.sin(a['time']); a['ib_b']=(Math.sin(div(a['time'],3))+(0.5*0.5)); a['ib_g']=((Math.cos(div(a['time'],3))*0.3)+(0.5*0.5)); a['ib_r']=((Math.sin(div(a['time'],3))*0.3)+(0.5*0.5)); a['ob_b']=(Math.sin((div(a['time'],3)+0.9))+(0.5*0.5)); a['ob_g']=Math.sin((a['time']+0.1)); a['ob_r']=(a['ob_g']+0.5);
pixel_eqs_str: a['xtc']=(Math.sin((a['time']*0.3))*10); a['speed']=(40-(above(a['bass'], 0.9)*15)); a['speed']=(a['speed']+a['xtc']); a['acid']=(-a['x']*Math.sin(a['time'])); a['morphine']=(-a['y']*Math.cos(a['time'])); a['dmt']=(above(div(((a['treb']*a['treb'])*a['treb']),3), 2.5)*2); a['saliva']=(above(a['treb'], 0.9)*2); a['cx']=(((a['morphine']*a['dmt'])*a['rad'])*0.3); a['cy']=(((a['acid']*a['saliva'])*a['rad'])*0.3); a['dx']=(Math.sin((a['y']*a['speed']))*0.01); a['dy']=(Math.cos((a['x']*a['speed']))*0.01); a['dx']=(a['dx']+0.007); a['dy']=(a['dy']+0.007);
